name: MOVEC.L D0,CACR; CACR,D1  write all-ones (030 mask, privileged)
UNPK D1,D0,#0 (D1 low byte=0x12 -> D0 low word=0x0102)
DBNE D1,loop  (Z=1 so NE always false; counts to -1)
DBEQ D1,loop  (Z=1 so EQ true; loop exits immediately)
BTST D1,(A1)+  A1=scratch, D1=7 -> tests bit 7 of 0x80
BSET D1,2(A6)  D1=0 -> set bit 0 of ram[2]=0x00
RTR  pop CCR=$07 + PC=(d16,PC) from stack
BSR.W / RTD #4  (A7 net +4 vs RTS; A7 excluded from diff)
LSR.L D1,D0 (cnt=64 mod64=0; no-op, C=0) D0=0xCAFEBABE
ROXL.L D1,D0 (cnt=0 via mod64; C=X, X unchanged) X=1 D0=0
BFEXTU D0{D1:D2},D3 dyn off+width (off=8 w=8 -> D3=0xFF)
BFCHG D0{D1:8} dyn off (D1=16 -> flip D0[16:8])
BFFFO (A6){0:32},D1  -> D1 = bit# of first set in 0xFEDCBA98
PACK D1,D0,#0xFFFF (D1=0x00003132 -> low byte = low byte of 0x3132+0xFFFF=0x3031 -> 0x01)
TST.W A0  (A0=$FFFFFFFE word part, but TST.W on An only valid 020+)
ADDX.L D1,D0  with X=1, overflow (D0=0x7FFFFFFF + D1=0 + 1 -> V=1,N=1)
SUBX.L D1,D0  with X=1, borrow (D0=0 - D1=0 - 1 -> -1, X=C=N=1)
BCLR D1,D0  D1=64 mod 32 = 0 (clear bit 0 of 0xFFFFFFFF)
NOP with CCR=0x1F preload (NOP preserves CCR)
ADD.L D1,D0  pos+pos overflow (D0=0x7FFFFFFF + D1=1 -> V=1,N=1)
ADD.L D1,D0  neg+neg overflow (D0=0x80000000 + D1=0xFFFFFFFF -> V=1)
SUB.L D1,D0  pos-neg overflow (D0=0x7FFFFFFF - D1=0xFFFFFFFF -> V=1)
SUB.B D1,D0  signed overflow (D0.B=0x80 - D1.B=1 -> V=1)
DBF D1,loop  cc=False, D1=2 (3 iter -> scratch[0]=3)
DBHI D1,loop  cc=False, D1=2 (3 iter -> scratch[0]=3)
DBVS D1,loop  cc=False, D1=2 (3 iter -> scratch[0]=3)
DBMI D1,loop  cc=False, D1=2 (3 iter -> scratch[0]=3)
EXC: DIVS.L D1,D0:D0  divide by zero (vec 5 / $14)
EXC: DIVU.L D1,D0:D0  divide by zero (vec 5 / $14)
ASR.L #31,D0 (cnt=8 imm; need Dm for >8). Use #7 -> 0xFF000000
MOVE.L D0,-(A1)  A1=scratch+8, writes to scratch+4
NOP x 4  (test prefetch over 4 sequential NOPs)
EXG A0,A7  (A0=scratch A7 unchanged; A7 not diffed)
BFTST D0{0:1}  D0=0xFFFFFFFF -> N=1 (bit 0 = top bit)
MOVE.B D0,-(A1)  A1=scratch+4 writes byte at scratch+3
MOVE.W D0,-(A1)  A1=scratch+4 writes word at scratch+2
LSL.W -(A1)  A1=scratch+4 -> shift word at scratch+2 = 0x4001 -> 0x8002
MOVEM.W D0-D3,-(A1)  predec, .W writes low word of each Dn
BCLR D1,(A1)+  A1=scratch (D1=7 -> clear bit 7 of 0xC0 = 0x40)
EXC: RTM D0  (020-only -> vec 4 on 030; MAME golden known-bad)
